Test Case Name: TC01_Verify Per Day Limit Field Not Mandatory for AB-SEF20 U_Fleet_New Business_AC1
Description: The objective of this test case is to validate that the Per Day Limit field is not mandatory for the AB-SEF20 U form when creating a new business submission in Fleet LOB
Action: 1. Navigate to Phoenix submission creation screen
Expected Result: 1. User should be able to view the submission creation screen with all required fields
Test Repository Path: Commercial Auto/CAMS-2275 Per Day Limit Non-Mandatory

Action: 2. Create a Domestic submission with Commercial Auto product
Expected Result: 2. User should be able to create a submission successfully

Action: 3. Navigate to Line selection screen
Expected Result: 3. User should be able to view the line selection screen

Action: 4. Select Fleet LOB and navigate to Vehicles screen
Expected Result: 4. User should be able to add and configure fleet vehicles

Action: 5. Fill all mandatory fields for Fleet
Expected Result: 5. All mandatory fields should be populated successfully

Action: 6. Navigate to Coverage/Forms section and select AB-SEF20 U form
Expected Result: 6. User should be able to select the AB-SEF20 U form for coverage

Action: 7. Verify Per Day Limit field is displayed
Expected Result: 7. Per Day Limit field should be visible in the form

Action: 8. Leave Per Day Limit field blank and proceed
Expected Result: 8. System should allow proceeding without entering Per Day Limit value (field is non-mandatory)

Action: 9. Complete pricing
Expected Result: 9. Pricing should complete successfully without Per Day Limit value
